name: send_transactional_email
description: Send a single transactional email using a pre-built template. Ideal for receipts, confirmations, and password resets.

parameters.name: emailId
parameters.description: The ID of the transactional email template to use.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message details including recipient email and optional custom properties.

parameters.name: contactProperties
parameters.description: Contact properties to use for personalization tokens in the email template.

parameters.name: customProperties
parameters.description: Custom properties for dynamic content in the email template.
